title: Flashlight
body:
### It's a simple Flashlight 1.7.10 mod (from: https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/flashlight-mod/) ported in to 1.12.2 and newer versions of Minecraft


It's add only a flashlight and battery.


Flashlight works in mainhand and offhand. It fits perfectly with the [HardcoreDarkness ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hardcore-darkness) mod:

![1](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/343/812/1.png)



### Battery installation:
**Take the battery to your offhand and the flashlight in your hand, then right-click**



### Crafting:

![f](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/343/816/flcrafting.PNG)

![b](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/787378778056687626/968240226269020270/unknown.png)
 

 

### Config:

![c](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/787378778056687626/968240734153080862/unknown.png)


***[ !! ] In my mods 1.12.2 version will be always supported at first, so sorry for long waiting time for updates to new versions [ !! ]***



This mod can be used without problems on a public Minecraft server.
